patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 
 #include <stdint.h>
 
-#define FLASH_PAGE_SIZE   256U
+#define FLASH_PAGE_SIZE   512U
 #define FLASH_SECTOR_SIZE 4096U
 
 int flash_read(uint32_t addr, uint8_t *buf, uint32_t len);
description: The `FLASH_PAGE_SIZE` macro was changed from 256 to 512, breaking callers that use this constant to size buffers or loop over pages.
